headline: UPU System Rejects 48,000 First-Choice University Applications
context: The centralized university placement system denied first-choice programs to 48,000 applicants for the 2026 academic year.

cards.big: 48,000 students placed in programs they did not choose through UPU in 2026
cards.sub: Mismatch between preferences and placements drives course-switching and dropout

cards.big: 23% of public university students switch programs within first 2 semesters
cards.sub: Program switching wastes an estimated RM180 million in teaching resources annually

cards.big: UPU algorithm prioritizes institutional capacity over student preference ranking
cards.sub: Students have no appeal mechanism beyond a 2-week complaint window

cards.big: UK UCAS system allows 5 direct applications giving students and universities choice
cards.sub: Decentralized admission produces better student-program matching outcomes

cards.big: Central planning of student futures creates systemic waste disguised as efficiency
Should Malaysia allow direct university applications alongside the UPU system
